name: TENAX THERAPEUTICS, INC.
summary: Tenax Therapeutics is a Phase 3, development-stage pharmaceutical company focused on developing novel cardiopulmonary therapies. Its prioritized product candidate is oral levosimendan (TNX-103), currently in two Phase 3 clinical trials (LEVEL and LEVEL-2) for pulmonary hypertension in heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (PH-HFpEF). The company has also deprioritized a Phase 3 trial of imatinib for pulmonary hypertension. Both drugs are already approved in other indications worldwide. Tenax has no approved products currently on the market.
